features: 【Mystical Forest Witch Design】Meet our witch statue (20cm tall), featuring an ancient forest enchantress with intricately twisted roots and a classic pointed hat. Perfect for witch figurine collectors and gothic decor enthusiasts, its elegant silhouette creates mesmerizing light play, emitting an enchanting glow in darkness for an irresistibly mystical aura.

【Hand-Painted Premium Resin Craftsmanship】Expertly sculpted from high-quality resin, this retro resin sculpture showcases breathtaking textures—gnarled roots, bark-like robes, and a powerful pose that captures the essence of dark fantasy and mystery.

【Intricate Detailing】Embodying eerie elegance, this gothic desktop ornament features weathered bark textures, subtle earthy tones, and hauntingly realistic features.Rich earthy tones and intricate carving ensure both longevity and enchanting authenticity, making it a timeless collectible figurine.

【Ideal Gift for Magic Lovers】Embodying feminine wisdom and mystical energy, this Hecate statue elevates altars, witchy home decor, or Halloween-themed spaces. A captivating dark fantasy gift for enthusiasts of witchcraft, Gothic art, or spooky aesthetics.

【Perfect for Halloween & Gothic Décor】Ideal as halloween decorations indoor or year-round gothic home decor, this piece adds elegant eeriness to desks, shelves, or entryways. Enhances any room, office, or haunted house with its hauntingly beautiful design.
